title: Mmolten Oozy Blueberry Norwegian Stew Robata Grill
description: A cozy and buttery blueberry stew featuring plant-based ingredients cooked on a robata grill for a delightful breakfast or light dinner.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to medium-high heat.
In a mixing bowl, combine blueberries, non-dairy milk, almond flour or oat flour, plant-based butter, vanilla extract, salt, and cardamom powder. Mix well until smooth.
Fold in fresh herbs if using.
Pour the mixture into a small saucepan over medium heat.
Stir continuously to prevent sticking and let it simmer for 5-7 minutes or until thickened slightly.
Using a ladle, carefully transfer the blueberry mixture into individual serving vessels (like cast iron skillets).
Grill the prepared vessels on the robata grill for about 30 seconds on each side to create the 'molten' effect.
Serve immediately with additional fresh herbs or toppings of your choice.
